creator: kevindd992002@yahoo.com
text:
I applied the workaround and it was not working for me. It broke things even further. Can you let me know what I did incorrectly? I posted my observations in this thread:

https://forum.netgate.com/post/953770

I only use routed VTI and no policy-based tunnel so the workaround is perfect for me. I just can't get it to work.
